titleStmt.title: SII 22.167: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 167. (A.R. No. 167 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. RĀJ. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—35th YEAR (A.D. 1104-05).

summary.p: The introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. is only briefly given in this record. It registers the transfer (by order of the king) of the village Vāṅgal alias Parundeṅgal comprising twenty vēli of wet and dry lands in Kiḻār-kūṟṟam under a new name Malaiyavichchādiranallūr from (the jurisdiction of) Vāṇakōvaraiyar as dēvadāna to the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷina-Mahādēva, with the tax (iṟai) due to the temple fixed at 70 kalam of paddy on every vēli of wet land and 30 kalam on dry land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa ṉilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟc ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavarkulaitara Eṉaimanṉava riḻiyaluṟṟaḻitarat tikkaṉaittun=tan cakkaranaṭātti virasi
ṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari patmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 5Āvatu nāḷ 100 4 10 5- nāl milāṭāṉa jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūṟk kūṟṟattu Iṟaivānarai yūrā
ṉa śrīcoḻakeraḷac caturvetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷina mahā devaṟkku vāṇakovaraiyarai māṟi yāṇṭu 3 10 5Āvatu mutal An=tarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟai(ṟa)yili Iṭṭa Iṉāṭṭukkiḻārāṟṟukkūṟṟattu vāṅkalāṉa parunteṅkal ṉirnilattum pu
nceyṉilattum yāṇṭu 3 10 5Āvatu mutal malaiyaviccātirinallūreṉṉum piyarāl veṟupiṟittut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭum nilam Irupatiṟṟuvelikku nir nilam veli 1-kku I 7 10 ḷa-mākavum puncey veli 1-kku I 3 10 ḷa-mākavum yāṇṭu 3 10 5- vatu mu
tal Iṟaikaṭṭat tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷiṉa ḷa 1nta ḷa Ittevaṟkku veṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka An=tarāyam Uṭppaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Ivai nākaṅ koṟṟaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷa mukaveṭṭi piṭavūr veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam veḷḷūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai veyūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi tevaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṭṭuvāykkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Āvūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
